task_completion.description: Verify that the main OpenICE Supervisor window is open and remains open throughout the process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenICE Supervisor GUI window should be visible in the screenshots and must not be closed at the end of the trajectory.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Case A devices were initially configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for earlier screenshots in the trajectory showing 'Capnograph' and 'Multiparameter Monitor' active or listed in the OpenICE Supervisor interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Case A session was cleared to perform the turnover.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for intermediate screenshots showing the 'Capnograph' and 'Multiparameter Monitor' being removed or the OpenICE interface being cleared of active devices.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Case B devices were configured after the turnover.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for later screenshots showing 'Infusion Pump' and 'Pulse Oximeter' active or listed in the OpenICE Supervisor interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that a text file named turnover_log.txt was created on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file icon named 'turnover_log.txt' on the Desktop (/home/ga/Desktop) or an open text editor/terminal creating this specific file.

task_completion.description: Verify the contents of the turnover log file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the open text editor or terminal showing the file's contents. It must contain the exact text 'Turnover Complete' (case-insensitive) followed by the names of the Case B devices ('Infusion Pump' and 'Pulse Oximeter').

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually interacted with the OpenICE GUI to configure the simulated devices.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show mouse clicks, dropdown menus, or device selection within the OpenICE Supervisor application, rather than just terminal commands spoofing a backend state.

integrity.description: Ensure the turnover was performed sequentially (Case A -> Clear -> Case B).
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show a clear chronological progression of adding Case A devices, removing them, and then adding Case B devices in the same OpenICE window.

integrity.description: Ensure the log file was genuinely created by the agent.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (like gedit, nano) or a terminal echo command being actively used by the agent to write the required text, rather than the file magically appearing.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Case A requires 'Capnograph' and 'Multiparameter Monitor'. Case B requires 'Infusion Pump' and 'Pulse Oximeter'. These are valid simulated device types in OpenICE. The log file must be at /home/ga/Desktop/turnover_log.txt and contain 'Turnover Complete' (case-insensitive) along with the Case B device names. The OpenICE Supervisor window must remain open at the end.
